exceptions.rationale: Legacy SQLite orchestration combines discovery, routing, CRUD, import/export, change overlays, and SQL console responsibilities; approved only while SIZE-01 splitting proceeds.
Legacy ADB command adapter still combines device, package, file, shell, reverse, and parsing capabilities; keep stable while capability command modules are extracted.
Legacy fixture corpus remains centralized during product-truth cleanup; it must move to capability-owned test fixtures or be removed before this exception closes.
Device file explorer combines navigation, transfer, preview, editing, and archive workflows; approved pending separation into focused file services and views.
Mirror backend combines stream lifecycle, codecs, capture, input, and event adapters; MIR-01 owns the staged runtime split.
Network surface combines capture lifecycle, filtering, virtual table, body loading, and request detail presentation; approved pending extraction of data and detail surfaces.
IndexedDB table combines TanStack configuration, editing actions, change overlays, virtualization, and presentation; approved pending responsibility extraction.
Replay database surface coordinates IndexedDB and SQLite snapshots, changes, filters, dialogs, and tables; REC-01 owns further capability separation.
Legacy device manager modal combines discovery, pairing, connection, package selection, target selection, and dialog presentation; approved pending module-owned workflow extraction.
IndexedDB explorer remains an orchestration surface for routing, metadata, paging, mutations, imports, exports, changes, and dialogs; approved pending focused composables.
SQLite backend currently combines discovery, queries, writes, metadata, export, and file synchronization adapters; approved pending service-oriented command extraction.
Performance view combines metric sampling, chart preparation, process inspection, and presentation; narrow exception remains until monitoring services are extracted.
Recording database adapter owns snapshot persistence, paging, schema conversion, and replay queries; REC-01 will split persistence from command adaptation.
Interactive documentation preview combines device, inspector, storage, console, and settings demonstrations; approved pending extraction into capability preview components.
Storage graph surface combines graph discovery, layout, filtering, selection, and detail presentation; narrow exception remains pending graph service extraction.
Network mock surface combines rule editing, persistence, interception mode, reverse setup, and request log presentation; approved pending editor and log extraction.
SQLite table combines column modeling, change overlays, row actions, virtualization, and table presentation; narrow exception remains pending action and overlay extraction.
